name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual expense report creation causes late submissions and potential penalties. We convert purchase orders into compliance-ready expense reports instead of manual expense report creation.
problem_solved: Need for compliance-ready expense reports from purchase orders.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Need for compliance-ready expense reports from purchase orders.
